REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE AND CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED RE: STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1-3. DELAYED DISCOVERY IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION DEMURER IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED RE: CCP 366.2, CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST 2415 BUCHANAN IS NOT BARRED BY CCP 366.2. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO RE-ALLEGE THIS CAUSE OF ACTION AS DECLARATORY RELIEF. AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION DEMURER IS OVERRULED. FACTS GIVING RISE TO INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Argued by Jeffery Woo for Defendants and Richard Hurlburt for Plaintiff. Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE, CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Third Amended Complaint. Re: Punitive damages is GRANTED with final leave to allege facts, not conclusions re: "active concealment," "intent to deprive Plaintiffs of their rights" and "intent to cause harm." New allegations shall be made in bold font. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE and CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is overruled re: Statute of Limitations as to causes of action 1-3. Delayed discovery is sufficiently alleged. As to the first cause of action demurer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled re: CCP 366.2, cause of action against 2415 Buchanan is not barred by CCP 366.2. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to re-allege this cause of action as declaratory relief. As to the second cause of action demurer is overruled. Facts giving rise to individual liability are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
